$comment: Retention & consolidation policy template. Numbers are illustrative defaults — replace with your legal/compliance requirements per jurisdiction.

L0_raw.consolidation: continuous -> L1; L0 itself is immutable and append-only

L1_episodic.consolidation: weekly: dedup, merge near-duplicates, promote recurring patterns to L2 as agent_inferred

L2_working.consolidation: on project close: settled conclusions promoted to L3 via human ratification

L3_semantic.consolidation: quarterly review of expired validity windows

regulated.notes: or as your regulator requires; deletion must reach graph nodes, documents AND embeddings — verify with a deletion audit

deletion_invariants: a compliance delete enumerates every projection of the node (graph, doc store, vector store, caches) and deletes all of them
deletion itself emits a provenance record (⑦) — you can prove WHAT was deleted and WHY without keeping the content
